'''鈭歵h-ch-k-dh''' ('''kathachkedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wedding|wedding]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ch-k-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wedding|wedding]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-ch-k-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kathachkedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithachkedhoko|thithachkedhoko]] || [[word:jithachkedhoko|jithachkedhoko]] || [[word:shithachkedhoko|shithachkedhoko]] || [[word:kithachkedhoko|kithachkedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothachkedhoko|thothachkedhoko]] || [[word:jothachkedhoko|jothachkedhoko]] || [[word:shothachkedhoko|shothachkedhoko]] || [[word:kothachkedhoko|kothachkedhoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
